title: 映画は学びでいっぱいよ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, in front of the station...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: So it is. Hey there.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Close. We came to rent a DVD.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
The forecast said this weekend would be gloomy,
so we thought we'd watch a movie in my room.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Lazing around, eating snacks, and watching
movies... Best combo in the world.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Who said I was going to be lazing around?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Yes, films are entertainment, but they're also full
of lessons.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Why, just the other day, a film taught me all
about the beauty of humility.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Are you sure you actually understood it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Just what is that supposed to mean?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
More importantly, which film should we rent? I've
seen most of the new releases.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'd prefer something with a valuable learning
experience. Do you have any recommendations,
Trainer?
choice_data_list:
How about this horror movie to inspire some
bravery?

What about this TV drama that talks about the
intricacies of relationships?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? H-horror?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, I like that sound of that. It's fun to watch
intense stuff from time to time.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: N-now, hold on! That doesn't suit me at all!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wouldn't you learn more from it because it's not your thing?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... Don't tell me, you're...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho! Me, afraid? Of course not!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the following week, after training...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Shuffle, shuffle.
choice_data_list: What are you on the lookout for?
What are you on the lookout for?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm not on the lookout for anything! It's not like
I'm worried about monsters showing up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, I'm off now! Thanks for today's session!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Turns out, King Halo did learn something from the movie she watched over the weekend—ways to escape monsters.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I see. Learning about how the characters live their
lives...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But we can't marathon a whole show in one day,
can we?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We can split it up. I'm intrigued to find out what
will happen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And then, during the following week's first
training session...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...S-so... Shall we begin our training?
choice_data_list: Are you okay? You seem kind of exhausted.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I couldn't resist. I watched all fifty-two episodes
in one go. Sky left partway through,
unfortunately.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I believe I did a splendid job of getting through
it, if I do say so myself...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although she was supposed to study
interpersonal relationships, King Halo ends up
enhancing her endurance instead.
